commit.message:
Add multi-classifier training pipeline, model persistence, and scorer (v5) (#1)

* Add multi-classifier training pipeline, model persistence, and scorer (v5)

- src/train_models.py: trains LogisticRegression, RandomForest, XGBoost
  pipelines with shared preprocessor and GridSearchCV tuning; saves best
  model unconditionally to results/models/ (Step 6.5, new in v5)
- src/score_new_data.py: standalone scorer loads best saved .pkl, scores
  unlabeled CSV, writes results/predictions.csv with customerID/probability/prediction
- tests/test_pipeline.py: 9 pytest tests covering data shape, null handling,
  target encoding, class imbalance ratio, preprocessor output shape/NaN-free,
  pipeline clone independence, LR ROC-AUC threshold, and scorer smoke test
- EDA visualizations (generate_plots.py + plots/), planning docs (v1–v5)
- uv.lock, updated pyproject.toml (xgboost, matplotlib, seaborn, pyarrow)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update CHANGELOG

* Add model-specific preprocessors: drop='first' for LR, drop=None for trees

Replace shared preprocessor with make_preprocessor(drop) factory and
PREPROCESSOR_DROP mapping. LR gets 30 features (drop='first'), tree
models get 40 features (drop=None). Retrain all models; XGBoost tuned
ROC-AUC improves from 0.8462 to 0.8471. Baseline backed up as
results_tuned_v5.csv.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: React UI 전환, SSE 백그라운드 생성, 대화 메모리, LLM Provider 패턴

주요 변경:
- Frontend: Streamlit → React 18 + TypeScript + TailwindCSS 전환
  - Chat: fetch SSE 스트리밍, 검색결과 아코디언, 4-state 피드백
  - Admin 5탭: 네임스페이스, 지식, 용어집, Few-shot, 통계, 디버그, LLM 설정
  - nginx 리버스 프록시 (SSE proxy_buffering off)

- Backend: SSE 스트리밍 asyncio.Task + Queue 디커플링
  - LLM 생성이 HTTP 연결과 독립 — 클라이언트 끊겨도 끝까지 실행
  - ops_message.status (generating/completed) 추적
  - Early Meta: DB insert 즉시 수행 후 0.02초 내 meta 이벤트 전송
  - Ghost message cleanup

- 대화 메모리: ConversationSummaryBuffer + Semantic Recall
  - 4회 교환마다 LLM 요약 → pgvector 저장
  - 새 질문과 유사 과거 요약 자동 리콜 (유사도 0.45+)

- LLM Provider 패턴: ollama/inhouse 런타임 전환
- Few-shot: 긍정 피드백 자동 저장, 유사 Q&A 프롬프트 삽입
- 문서 현행화: architecture.md, flow.md, user-manual.md, sse-streaming-manual.md

commit.message:
fix(ui, component-catalog): widen ListTransition children type to Node (#981)

* fix(ui, component-catalog): widen ListTransition children type to Node [#979]

The `ListTransitionProps.children` callback was typed as
`(item: T) => HTMLElement | SVGElement`, but JSX component calls return
`JSX.Element` which includes `DocumentFragment`. This caused typecheck
failures in entity-todo and component-catalog.

Changes:
- Widen `ListTransitionProps.children` to `(item: T) => Node`
- Widen internal `listTransition` renderFn to `(item: T) => Node`
- Guard `setAttribute`/`removeAttribute` calls with `instanceof Element`
- Fix component-catalog `demos/index.ts` to use `Node` return type
- Fix component-catalog `router.ts`: remove unused import, replace
  `as any` with `as Record<string, unknown>`
- Add `.claude/commands/full-test.md` slash command for full e2e validation

Closes #979

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ui): guard exit path against non-Element nodes in listTransition [#979]

Replace unsafe `as Element` cast with proper `instanceof Element` guard
on the exit path. Non-Element nodes (e.g., DocumentFragment) now get
removed immediately instead of going through the animation pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Items 9-12: SQLite context managers, scan lock, alert/action dedup indexes

Item 9: All DB connections now use closing(sqlite3.connect(..., timeout=5))
  — ensures connections are always closed and waits up to 5s on a locked DB
  instead of failing immediately.

Item 10: acquire_scan_lock() / release_scan_lock() via fcntl.flock prevent
  concurrent CLI + dashboard scans. main() and /run both acquire the lock;
  /run returns HTTP 503 if the lock is already held.

Item 11: Partial unique index on alerts(title) WHERE resolved=0 makes alert
  dedup atomic. AlertStorage.save() now uses INSERT OR IGNORE.

Item 12: Partial unique index on pending_actions(action_type, params)
  WHERE status='pending' makes action dedup atomic. save_pending_actions()
  now uses INSERT OR IGNORE, removing the SELECT-then-INSERT race.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(deps): upgrade vulnerable dependencies to address Dependabot alerts (#525)

Python (pip):
- django 5.2.8 → 5.2.12 (SQL injection, DoS, race condition, timing)
- django-allauth 65.12.0 → 65.14.3 (open redirect, mutable identifiers, inactive user tokens)
- authlib 1.6.5 → 1.6.9 (alg:none bypass, 1-click account takeover)
- cryptography 46.0.3 → 46.0.5 (SECT curves subgroup attack)
- urllib3 2.5.0 → 2.6.3 (decompression bomb via redirect, streaming API, link chain)
- sqlparse 0.5.3 → 0.5.5 (DoS via list of tuples formatting)
- filelock 3.20.0 → 3.25.0 (TOCTOU symlink vulnerabilities)
- marshmallow 4.0.1 → 4.2.2 (DoS in Schema.load(many=True))
- virtualenv 20.35.3 → 21.1.0 (TOCTOU in directory creation)
- nltk 3.9.2 → 3.9.3 (zip slip vulnerability)

JavaScript (npm):
- ajv 8.17.1 → 8.18.0 via pnpm override (ReDoS with $data option)
- markdown-it 14.1.0 → 14.1.1 via pnpm override (ReDoS)

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(daemon): multi-provider hook abstraction + ui stub

Introduce a provider package with a clean interface for integrating CLI
tools (claude-code, opencode, codex, stdout). Each provider knows how to:
  - Setup() — write hook/config files into the work dir before spawning
  - Env()   — inject extra env vars into the spawned process
  - UsesHooks() — whether HTTP hooks or process-exit drives completion

Changes:
- provider/provider.go   — Provider interface + Detect(command, override)
- provider/claudecode.go — full impl: writes .claude/settings.json hooks
- provider/opencode.go   — stub with TODO
- provider/codex.go      — stub with CODEX_HOOKS_SERVER_URL TODO
- provider/stdout.go     — fallback: process-exit only
- config: add agents[].provider field (optional, auto-detected)
- agent: inject provider, call Setup()/Env() in startTask; add Name()
- hooks/server.go: add /hooks/codex stub + improved comments
- hooks/writehooks.go: deleted (logic moved to provider/claudecode.go)
- ui/ui.go: headless stub documenting future systray implementation
- main.go: wire ui.AgentStatus, log provider name per agent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: initialize unobservable MobX fields in Frame and FrameDocument

FrameDocument.frame, Frame.currentDocument, and Frame.currentOwnerElement
were declared as class fields but never assigned in constructors. With
useDefineForClassFields:false (TS default for ES2020 target), uninitialized
fields don't create runtime properties, so makeAutoObservable never sees
them. This caused the context pane's Frame field to not appear reactively
after registration linked a sourceId to a frame.

Also makes mock port delivery async (queueMicrotask) to match real
chrome.runtime.Port behavior, and exposes frameStore/autorun on the
test harness for diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement subprocess sandbox for tool execution isolation (#131) (#153)

## Summary

- **Subprocess sandbox backend** (`SubprocessSandbox`) implementing the
`SandboxBackend` protocol for tool execution isolation
- **Environment filtering**: allowlist + denylist with fnmatch patterns,
library injection var blocking (`LD_PRELOAD`, `PYTHONPATH`, etc.),
case-insensitive matching on Windows
- **PATH restriction**: filters to safe system directories with secure
fallback (never exposes unfiltered PATH)
- **Workspace boundary enforcement**: rejects commands with `cwd`
outside the workspace
- **Timeout + process-group kill**: kills entire process group on Unix
to prevent orphaned grandchild processes
- **Git tool integration**: all 6 git tools (`GitStatusTool`,
`GitLogTool`, `GitDiffTool`, `GitBranchTool`, `GitCommitTool`,
`GitCloneTool`) accept optional `SandboxBackend` via `_BaseGitTool`,
with git hardening env vars passed as `env_overrides`
- **Security hardening**: secret-substring filtering in direct git
subprocess path, `MappingProxyType` for hardening overrides, `http://`
removed from allowed clone schemes
- **Correctness fixes**: `timeout=0.0` no longer silently uses default,
`returncode=0` no longer mapped to `-1`, proper `raise from exc`
chaining
- **DESIGN_SPEC.md updates**: fixed sandbox filenames, added missing
files, updated implementation status, added `sandbox.py` to events
listing

## Files

### New
- `src/ai_company/tools/sandbox/` — `__init__.py`, `config.py`,
`errors.py`, `protocol.py`, `result.py`, `subprocess_sandbox.py`
- `src/ai_company/observability/events/sandbox.py` — 11 SANDBOX_* event
constants
- `tests/unit/tools/sandbox/` — config, errors, protocol, result,
subprocess_sandbox tests
- `tests/unit/tools/git/test_git_sandbox_integration.py` — sandbox
integration for 5 git tools
- `tests/integration/tools/test_sandbox_integration.py` — real git +
sandbox e2e
- `tests/integration/tools/conftest.py` — shared `git_repo` fixture

### Modified
- `src/ai_company/tools/_git_base.py` — sandbox integration, secret
filtering, `MappingProxyType`
- `src/ai_company/tools/git_tools.py` — remove `http://` from clone
schemes
- `DESIGN_SPEC.md` — §11.1.2 and §15.3 updates

## Test plan

- [x] All 2387 tests pass (`uv run pytest tests/ -n auto`)
- [x] Coverage: 96.43% (threshold: 80%)
- [x] mypy: 0 errors across 275 files
- [x] ruff: all checks pass, formatting clean
- [x] Pre-commit hooks: all pass

## Review coverage

Pre-reviewed by 10 agents (code-reviewer, python-reviewer,
pr-test-analyzer, silent-failure-hunter, comment-analyzer,
type-design-analyzer, logging-audit, resilience-audit,
security-reviewer, docs-consistency). 21 findings triaged and addressed.

Closes #131

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- sync-content.js nyní před každým upsert smaže starý záznam
  se stejným title+node_id (různé UUID = Storage/ruční import)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Holistics cron picks future months with $0 ARR, breaking dashboard

The Holistics report returns data up to March 2027 with $0 for future
months. The cron was blindly taking the last month as "current", which
overwrote all ARR values with 0 and blanked the dashboard.

Three fixes:
- Skip future empty months: find the latest month with real data
- Never overwrite existing ARR > 0 with $0 from Holistics
- Don't hide dashboard when ARR is 0 (updatedAt is the real indicator)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Android device showing 'K': use Client Hints API for real model name

Chrome 110+ intentionally reduces UA — device model becomes 'K'.
navigator.userAgentData.getHighEntropyValues() gives the real model
(e.g. 'Pixel 7', 'SM-S918B'). Runs async after initial UA parse,
overrides device/OS fields if better data is available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(agente): audit and fix memory system — KG extraction, dedup, meta-filter, admin corrections

P1: Hook path now captures _embed_memory_best_effort return and calls
extract_and_link_entities() — KG was completely dead (0 records).

P3: Semantic dedup via _check_memory_duplicate() before creating empresa
memories — prevents near-duplicate entries with different slugs.

P4: KNOWLEDGE_EXTRACTION_PROMPT now excludes AI/system meta-discussion
terms (memoria, embedding, hook, PRD, etc.) to avoid meta-junk.

P5: admin_save_correction saves once as empresa (user_id=0) instead of
broadcasting N identical copies per user.

P6: Sanitization migration script deletes 42 empty dirs, ~25 meta-junk/
duplicate IDs, migrates 3 admin corrections to empresa scope, and
cleans orphan embeddings.

the RatingCacheInvalidator can now always bump student_ratings
namespace because student_id is never None.

commit.message:
Add interval limit buttons to Pentatonic and So La Mi Re Do Trainers

Replace single Step Limit On/Off toggle with three radio-style buttons
(Max 3rd, Max 4th, Max 5th) in both trainer modules. Max 3rd is active
by default, limiting consecutive note intervals to a major third (<=4
semitones). Only one limit can be active at a time; clicking an active
button deactivates it. Active button is teal, inactive buttons are dark
grey. Pentatonic trainer persists the setting to session storage.

Bump version 3.21.1 → 3.22.1

commit.message:
fix: harden Gemini routing — native API always wins when key available

Routing rules (in priority order):
1. Explicit Gemini model ID + GEMINI_API_KEY available → native Gemini API
   (even if provider='openrouter' is forced)
2. Explicit Gemini model + no Gemini key + OpenRouter key → OR with google/ prefix
3. veo/imagen/deep-research + no Gemini key → error (no OR equivalent)
4. model=None + provider='openrouter' + OR key → OpenRouter default
5. Non-Gemini model + OR key → OpenRouter
6. Any model + no matching key → clear error

Also adds _to_openrouter_google_id() and 14 new unit tests (37 total, all passing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Say It Another Way forbidden words — remove generic filler

deriveForbiddenWords() was always padding with ["thing","word"] regardless
of the target word, producing nonsense forbidden lists (e.g. "bell" →
metal, object, thing, word — only metal makes sense).

Fix: pull up to 4 meaningful content words from definition + sentence
combined, with no hardcoded filler. "bell" now correctly bans the actual
descriptive words from its definition instead of generic placeholders.

fix(prayers): fix timezone bug in recurrence day calculation

Date-only strings like "2026-03-02" are parsed as UTC midnight,
which in Finnish timezone (UTC+2/3) shifts to the previous day.
Now manually parse yyyy-MM-dd as local date components and use
Math.round instead of Math.floor for DST safety.

commit.message:
MC Evolution Sprint: first coordinated multi-agent campaign

Campaign infrastructure:
- Campaigns page (/campaigns) with agent cards, sprint filtering, wins/losses/remaining debrief
- Sprint Prompts page (/prompts) with one-click copy for agent dispatch
- Campaign auto-linking via prompt-hook.js (detects agent name in first prompt)
- Campaign status API (active/paused/completed)
- Retrospective section with review tracking (localStorage)
- Debrief filter by sprint (Initial Push / Follow-Up) and by agent

Dashboard improvements:
- Campaign badges on agent cards with link back to /campaigns
- StatusLine showing what each agent is currently doing
- Performance fix: /api/agents 18.5s → 1.4s (skip prompt reading for stale sessions + 2s cache)
- Tool summary pills between prompts on session detail page

Agent lifecycle:
- Terminal auto-naming from first prompt (prompt-hook.js)
- /name command for manual terminal renaming
- /end-session command with structured retrospective output
- statusLine field in hook.js for orchestrator visibility

New pages:
- /campaigns — coordinated sprint war room
- /prompts — one-click agent prompt dispatch
- /why — value proposition landing page (Compass draft)
- /health — system integrity and API diagnostics (Medic)
- /video-findings — 2-hour demo transcript analytics (Findings Analyst)

Findings system:
- Pain Points section (Tier 5) moved to top of Findings page
- Critical findings visually elevated (purple border + dot)
- 12+ new findings (f023-f035) from campaign coordination lessons
- Post-mortems PM007 (notification miss) and PM008 (Dashboard blank from server/client JS confusion)

Data:
- campaigns.json with full debrief (wins, losses, remaining)
- Video transcript + analysis from 2-hour demo session
- 30+ new dispatch items across home and work contexts
- Areas: added "showcase" for work presentations

CLAUDE.md Rule #10 added: every UI output must be human-centered and visually polished.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix checkers-chameleon interaction by adding 'checkers' capture type

Create distinct 'checkers' captureType to separate checkers from long-leaper behavior.
This fixes two bugs:
- Chameleons no longer treat checkers as long-leapers (multi-square orthogonal jumps)
- Check detection now works correctly for checkers

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Persist Spectranet flash config page across sessions instead of SRAM

The config lives in flash page 0x1F, which loadROM() overwrites with
defaults on each new WASM instance. Save the flash config to IndexedDB
and restore it after enable/reset but before ROM init runs, so the ROM
reads saved config from flash into SRAM naturally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Supabase Realtime + auto-refresh news feed

- Singleton DB client for persistent connection
- Realtime subscription on attacks/locations/weapons tables
- Green LIVE badge in header when connected, flashes on new data
- News feed auto-refreshes every 5 minutes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore(bd-3s3): close starvation alert as false positive

Investigation found 8 beads available in ready-queue.json:
- 5 open beads with NO dependencies ready for pickup
- bd-129 dependency (bd-21r) is closed, making it available

Worker discovery logic failed to find these beads - this is a
bug in the priority chain, not genuine lack of work.

feat: 候補通知信與確認信分流，新增候補升級通知

1. registration-confirm.tsx 加入 status prop：
   - confirmed：完整內容（線上連結、入場說明）
   - waitlisted：簡化內容（感謝報名、候補說明、無敏感連結）

2. 新增 waitlist-promoted.tsx：
   管理員將候補升級為確認時自動寄出，包含完整活動資訊

3. admin registrations route：
   批次更新 status 為 confirmed 時，自動偵測原為 waitlisted 的
   報名者，非同步寄送升級通知信

Tab cycling now selects Workers and Live Activity panels independently
instead of highlighting both together. Added PanelLiveActivity constant
and activityScroll for independent scrolling of the activity log.

  entry when scroll is past the end of a shrunk activity list

  visible line and that stale/oversized scroll is handled gracefully

commit.message:
Fix silent API errors, consolidate config constants, remove SearchBar scoped styles

- Mapset API now throws on failure instead of silently returning null
- Extract defaultMapsetId and defaultLayerIds to config/index.ts (single source of truth)
- Replace SearchBar scoped CSS with Tailwind classes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore mobile navigation — replace overflow-x:hidden on body with overflow-x:clip on html

overflow-x:hidden on body clips position:fixed children (header, mobile nav)
on iOS/Chrome mobile, making the hamburger menu invisible and navigation
impossible. overflow-x:clip on html achieves the same without affecting
fixed-position elements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add GitHub Actions release workflow

Manually-triggered workflow that detects the current WoT version
from wot-src, builds all mods, and creates a GitHub release with
versioned tags (wot-{VERSION}-build{N}).
